title: Platform Receipt Profile Envelope (v1)
description: Platform receipt profile over the generic Northroot proof envelope. This compatibility schema defines a minimal verifiable envelope; domain layers supply receipt semantics via profiles or consuming protocols.

event_id.description: Verifiable identity of this receipt-profile proof envelope (content-derived digest of the canonical envelope; excludes event_id field).

event_type.description: Receipt-profile event type. Suggested generic examples: intent.accepted, auth.decided, exec.performed, commit.applied, artifact.emitted.

event_version.description: Receipt-profile event type version (string for forward compatibility).

occurred_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the recorded event occurred.

canonical_profile_id.description: Canonicalization profile used for hashing/verifying this receipt-profile proof envelope.

prev_event_id.description: Optional hash-chain pointer for continuity proofs within a journal.

intent_ref.description: Optional link back to an accepted intent (either by event_id of a receipt-profile proof envelope or by digest of a canonical intent document).

inputs.description: Input content refs bound into this proof envelope (evidence).

outputs.description: Output content refs bound into this proof envelope (evidence).
